product_overview: A role-driven web application that centralizes clinic operations — scheduling, patient medical files, session recording, inventory, coupons, notifications, and financial reporting — with tailored portals for Superadmin, Admin, Doctor, Assistant and Accountant roles.
core_goals: Allow staff to create and manage appointments and daily schedules
Centralize patient medical files per doctor with sessions, photos, prescriptions, and attachments
Record sessions with materials and coupons to produce accurate net-profit calculations
Maintain inventory of consumable materials and decrement stock when used in sessions
Create, preview and apply coupon discounts to sessions
Provide role-appropriate dashboards and permission-scoped access
Produce financial reports exportable to CSV for accounting

features.name: Authentication and Session Restore
features.description: Let users sign in with email/password, maintain a session token, and land in the dashboard appropriate to their role.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit login form -> Be redirected to your role-specific dashboard (e.g., /admin, /doctor, /assistant, /accountant, /superadmin) -> See navigation and modules allowed for your role
Navigate to /login -> Enter wrong password -> Submit login form -> See validation error about credentials

features.name: Password Recovery
features.description: Allow users to request a password reset and set a new password using the reset page.
user_flows: Navigate to /forgot-password -> Enter account email and submit reset request -> See confirmation that a reset was requested
Navigate to /reset-password -> Enter new password and confirmation -> Submit reset form -> See confirmation and navigate to /login

features.name: Appointment & Calendar Management
features.description: Create, view and manage appointments in monthly and daily calendar views with role-scoped visibility.
user_flows: Navigate to /assistant -> Open appointment creation -> Select patient -> Select doctor -> Choose date -> Choose start time -> Set duration -> Submit to save appointment -> See appointment listed in the calendar for the chosen date
Navigate to /doctor -> View daily calendar -> See only appointments assigned to you for the selected day
Navigate to /admin -> Open appointment in calendar -> Edit appointment details -> Save changes -> See updated appointment time and details

features.name: Patient Management
features.description: Create and maintain patient records, search patients, and view demographics and visit history.
user_flows: Navigate to /assistant -> Open patient creation -> Enter patient name and contact details -> Submit to save patient -> See new patient in patient list
Navigate to /admin -> Search for a patient by name or phone -> Open patient detail -> See demographics, linked files, and visit history
Navigate to /admin -> Open existing patient -> Edit contact details -> Submit changes -> See updated patient record

features.name: Patient File Management
features.description: Manage a doctor-scoped patient file containing session records, photos, prescriptions, and attachments.
user_flows: Navigate to /doctor -> Open patient list -> Open patient file for a listed patient -> Create a new treatment session and save -> See session appended to the patient file
Navigate to /doctor -> Open an existing patient file -> Upload a before photo for the patient file -> See the photo listed under 'before' photos
Navigate to /doctor -> Open patient file -> Add a prescription with medication, dosage and notes -> Save prescription -> See prescription listed in the file

features.name: Session Recording & Financial Tracking
features.description: Log completed appointment sessions with service, materials used and optional coupon so the system stores price snapshots and computes net profit.
user_flows: Navigate to /doctor -> Open a completed appointment -> Create session record by selecting performed service -> Add one or more materials used with quantities -> Optionally enter a coupon code to preview discount -> Submit session -> See session saved with service price, discount amount, total materials cost and net profit
Navigate to /doctor -> Create session record and enter invalid material quantity (e.g., negative number) -> Submit form -> See validation error for material quantity

features.name: Materials & Tools Inventory
features.description: Create and manage materials and tools, track stock quantity, and reflect consumption when materials are used in sessions.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Open material creation -> Enter name, type (material/tool), unit price and stock quantity -> Submit to save item -> See item listed with current stock quantity
Navigate to /doctor -> Create session and add a material usage with quantity -> Submit session -> See material stock quantity decreased by the used amount

features.name: Coupon and Discount Operations
features.description: Create coupons, preview discount amounts, and apply coupons to sessions with usage tracking and caps.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Create a coupon with code, type (percent or fixed), value and validity window -> Save coupon -> See coupon in the coupons list
Navigate to /doctor -> While creating a session, enter a coupon code -> Preview discount -> If valid, apply coupon and submit session -> See discount amount recorded on the session
Navigate to /doctor -> While creating a session, enter an expired or invalid coupon code -> Preview coupon -> See validation error indicating coupon is invalid or expired

features.name: Financial Reports & CSV Export
features.description: View session-level and aggregate financial reports filtered by date, doctor or service and export results to CSV.
user_flows: Navigate to /accountant -> Open Reports tab -> Select date range and optional filters -> Run session report -> See list of sessions with service price, materials cost, discount and net profit
Navigate to /accountant -> From the report view, request CSV export -> Receive CSV file containing the filtered report data

features.name: Notifications (Reminders & Confirmations)
features.description: Create, view and batch-send appointment notifications (reminders and confirmations) and see pending notification counts.
user_flows: Navigate to /assistant -> Open notifications -> Create a reminder for a scheduled appointment -> Submit notification -> See notification recorded with method and message content
Navigate to /admin -> Run batch reminder send for upcoming appointments within configured window -> See pending notifications listed and then marked as sent after sending

features.name: User Management
features.description: Create and manage user accounts, assign roles and permission flags, and toggle active status.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Open user creation -> Enter name, email, role and permission flags -> Submit to create user -> See new user in the user list
Navigate to /superadmin -> Open system user list -> Toggle a user's active status -> See user marked as inactive and prevented from logging in

features.name: Practitioner Type Configuration
features.description: Define practitioner types with permissions, feature flags and scheduling defaults, then assign types to doctors.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Create a practitioner type with name, category and scheduling defaults -> Configure permission and feature flags -> Save practitioner type -> See type listed
Navigate to /admin -> Open a doctor's profile -> Assign the newly created practitioner type to the doctor -> Save profile -> See doctor inherit practitioner type configuration

features.name: System Administration (Superadmin)
features.description: Allow Superadmin to enable/disable modules and feature flags, configure role tab visibility and run system commands from the control panel.
user_flows: Navigate to /superadmin -> Open module management -> Disable a module for a role -> Save changes -> See navigation tabs for affected roles updated according to module visibility
Navigate to /superadmin -> Open feature flags -> Toggle a feature flag -> Save changes -> See the related UI behavior reflect the new flag state

routes.description: Landing page with navigation to login
Reset password with token and email query params
Admin dashboard with clinic management modules
Doctor portal for schedules and patient files
Superadmin control panel for system settings and users

features.name: Authentication and Session Restore
features.description: Supports login/logout, restore session from token, and role-based landing after login
user_interactions: See validation or API error on failure

features.name: Password Recovery
features.description: Allows users to request and complete password reset flow
user_interactions: Open reset page from tokenized URL

features.name: Patient File Management
features.description: Manage sessions, photos, prescriptions, and attachments inside patient medical file modal
user_interactions: Open patient file from patient list
Add and remove prescriptions and attachments

features.name: Coupon and Discount Operations
features.description: Create, manage, and apply coupons to sessions with discount preview
user_interactions: Apply coupon in session form and preview discount

known_limitations.issue: Routing is state-based in App component and not true URL router for most pages.
known_limitations.impact: Deep-linking and direct browser navigation to role dashboards is limited.

known_limitations.issue: Some role dashboard tabs are controlled client-side by permissions and module visibility payload.
known_limitations.impact: UI visibility depends on API payload correctness and may hide features if visibility is misconfigured.
